description_long: This is a modern, upholstered lounge sofa with a plush, tufted backrest and armrests, finished in a soft, light taupe fabric. The sofa features three large, loose seat cushions and four decorative throw pillows with geometric and floral patterns, adding both comfort and visual interest. The armrests are wide, padded, and also tufted, matching the backrest's classic button detailing. The base and legs are made of wood or metal with a light finish, slightly tapered and angled for a contemporary look. The overall silhouette is rectangular with clean lines, while the tufting and pillows provide a touch of elegance. This lounge is designed for comfort and style, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A plush, tufted taupe lounge sofa with wide padded armrests, decorative pillows, and tapered light-finish legs. The design blends modern lines with classic button detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the sofa, tufted armrest, and arrangement of cushions along the back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tufted backrest, three seat cushions, and four decorative pillows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other armrest and cushion arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the tops of the cushions and pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and four loose decorative throw pillows arranged along the backrest; cushions are rectangular and evenly spaced.
attribute_backrest_design: High, straight backrest with deep button tufting and a continuous, padded structure.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; wide, padded, straight armrests with tufted detailing, matching the backrest height.
attribute_leg_style: Short, tapered legs with a light wood or metal finish, slightly angled outward for stability and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid taupe fabric with deep button tufting on the backrest and armrests; throw pillows feature geometric and floral patterns.
